steps.title: Identify input and output
steps.content: The function $s(t)$ gives the mass remaining, in grams, after $t$ years. In $s(93)=31$, the input is $93$ years and the output is $31$ grams remaining.

steps.title: Match the interpretation
steps.content: So the statement means approximately $31$ grams remains $93$ years after the sample starts to decay. The answer is A.
